title: hieracium stupposum
intro: Hieracium stupposum, also known as Rough Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its hairy leaves and stem. The medicinal properties of Hieracium stupposum include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium stupposum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Hieracium stupposum can be made into teas, infusions, or topical ointments, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
